message:
fix(tests): clean up unused imports and misleading test description

- tokenizer.service.test.ts: Fix misleading test description
  "null/undefined" -> "empty input" (test actually tests empty string)
- audit.test.ts: Remove unused imports (afterEach, beforeEach, AuditEvent)
- agent-events.test.ts: Remove unused imports (getAgentEventsService,
  startAgentEvents, stopAgentEvents)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
